name: Baked Cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange cucumber slices and onion pieces in layers on a baking sheet.
2. Sprinkle each layer with salt, pepper, and flour.
3. Pour chili sauce over the top of the vegetables.
4. Dot the mixture with small pieces of margarine.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 30 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
